svg.title: D365 Observability Hub — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Full architecture showing user, Claude Code, 7 agents, settings, schema, App Insights tables, and output layer

g.text: reads config · spawns agents · manages loop · sleeps 60 min

svg.text: SPECIALIST AGENTS · run in parallel every cycle
AZURE APP INSIGHTS · pu47appinsights · auth: az rest (Azure AD)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What batch events are in customEvents table?')
sendPrompt('What is in the exceptions table?')
sendPrompt('What is in the pageViews table?')

svg.text: OUTPUTS · written to disk · new file every cycle · never overwritten

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the reports folder?')
sendPrompt('What is in the alerts folder?')
sendPrompt('What is in the kql-cache folder?')
